feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Deletion of CI_COBL
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
We have one field in CI_COBL which needs to be deleted. As the structure cannot be empty we have to delete CI_COBL completely. Doing that makes our system inconsistent as some transaction says CI_COBL is not there.

The questions here are, 
1. SAP is giving option to add fields and deletion cant be?

2. As we have deleted CI_COBL our DDIC tables were inconsistent, BSEG, ACDOCA. We are looking for ways to regenerate it as SE14 is not working (The filed in CI_COBL still remains in table level)

entry.title: Hide columns in Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen via My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to seek for advice on how to hide a column in the Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen in My Inbox app. I am able to add 4 columns (Asset Number, Internal Number, GL Account and Cost Center) by using CDS View extension. After adding the columns, I was requested to hide one column (Connected Material) as the table now looks squished and that particular column is not in use. However, I am unable to use CDS Metadata extension because there is no annotation to allow metadata extension in the CDS C_PurRequisitionItemFs. Is there any way I could hide the column? Any advice would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Please any custom ABAP code to check DDIC object naming via Code Inspector?
entry.content:
Hello, I want to create a Code Inspector check, to check the names of custom DDIC objects created, to respect the naming conventions given by my client (e.g. data elements should be named ZE_*, structures should be name ZS_*, etc.)

Did anyone create such a custom code, and could share the code please?

Sandra

NB: it's almost the same question as Re: How to enhance a customize DDIC checks for cod... - SAP Community, except that the guy was reporting a problem to develop this custom Code Inspector check, and did not share the code.

entry.title: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am looking to have the CU50 in internal tables. For several days, I have been trying to debug standard looking for a function or other which will give me what I need but I can't find anything.
I want from my material and the characteristics values and the variant cost :

All components associated with the hierarchy and their amount.

Thanks a lot in advance for your help

BRegards

ABAP Development

entry.title: Please any ABAP code for Code Inspector to check SORT before Binary Search, not limited to SELECT?
entry.content:
In Code Inspector, there is an SAP test "Search problematic statements for result of SELECT/OPEN CURSOR without ORDER BY" (CL_CI_TEST_NO_ORDER_BY) which is able to detect among other things that a READ TABLE ITAB BINARY SEARCH is missing a previous sorting of ITAB, e.g. here SORT is missing:

REPORT.
TYPES tt_scarr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF scarr WITH EMPTY KEY.
DATA(gt_scarr) = VALUE tt_scarr( ).
SELECT * FROM scarr INTO TABLE @GT_scarr.
*SORT gt_scarr BY carrname.
PERFORM form USING gt_scarr.

FORM form USING it_scarr TYPE tt_scarr.
  READ TABLE it_scarr WITH KEY carrname = 'British Airways' 
       BINARY SEARCH INTO DATA(ls_scarr).
ENDFORM.

But I'd like to extend this check to standard internal tables passed by SAP as parameters of user exits like workflow exit function modules, user exit function modules, BAdI implementations, etc., e.g. workflow start condition check (old interface):

FUNCTION z_check_fb_start_cond_eval
    IMPORTING
      VALUE(OBJTYPE) LIKE SWETYPECOU-OBJTYPE
      VALUE(OBJKEY) LIKE SWEINSTCOU-OBJKEY
      VALUE(EVENT) LIKE SWETYPECOU-EVENT
      VALUE(RECTYPE) LIKE SWETYPECOU-RECTYPE
    TABLES
      EVENT_CONTAINER LIKE SWCONT
    EXCEPTIONS
      ERROR_EVENT_CONTAINER_EMPTY.
*SORT event_container BY value.
  READ TABLE event_container WITH KEY value = 'A' 
       BINARY SEARCH INTO DATA(ls_element).
ENDFUNCTION.

Has anyone created such a custom Code Inspector check and can provide the code?

Thank you very much!

Sandra

NB: for information, there's also the simpler SAP internal test "Search READ .. BINARY SEARCH for unsorted results of SELECT statements" (CL_CI_TEST_SELECT_BIN_SEARCH) which does the same as CL_CI_TEST_NO_ORDER_BY for the above-described case.

entry.title: Font Size in UIBB in sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have a doubt as below and kindly suggest me the same. Thanks.

I have 2 uibb as below. I just want to know how to keep the same font size even when a block is collapse or not.

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: How to change field position in output display of transaction code: S_ALR_87012357
entry.content: I have added a new field to the output display of transaction code S_ALR_87012357 using FI_TAX_BADI_014 and mapped this field for data in FI_TAX_BADI_011. Now I just need to change the position of the field that I added; can anyone help me with it?

entry.title: Production order Co08 giving blank commits in Status
entry.content:
Hi all,

So in this requirement we need to update the sales order "Obj Status" with respect to Status of Plan Order (CO08 & CO02). To do this we are using BADI WORKORDER_UPDATE~ATSAVE. In the system the object status is maintained via a custom profile with is stored in JEST table. For that object all the active status are blank and inactive are X. 

 

I've written a code to do the modify, earlier using I_OBJECT_CHANGE, now Modify statment. After save i opened the update debugging I realised the commit happens after transaction is closed. But what it is doing is it is adding an extra empty line and since it's empty the inactive indicatior is false so it comes as active in system and no radio button is checked in sales order screen where this object status is displayed.

entry.title: Access value of badi parameter 'Type Ref to'
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need to use Badi TPM_AMORTIZATION_CAL, methode CHANGE_AMORTIZATION.

In this methode I would like to use the importing parameter "IM_POSITION". This parameter if from type "Type Ref To".

"IM_POSITION" has a methode "GET_POS_MAN_PROC" which provides parameter "RE_POS_MAN_PROC".

Could you please help me to access the value within parameter "RE_POS_MAN_PROC".

I need to write a check based on the value in it.

Many thanks

Thorsten

entry.title: ABAP Dump LIST_TOO_MANY_LPROS:Modify Screen.
entry.content:
Dear ALl,

I am getting dump ABAP Dump LIST_TOO_MANY_LPROS at line MODIFY SCREEN.. 

Code as below:

      LOOP AT SCREEN.
        IF screen-name = '%#AUTOTEXT005'.  "Sdeshpan
          screen-invisible = ' '.  "Visisble NXT
          screen-active = '1'.
          MODIFY SCREEN.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.

Kindly help,

Regards.

entry.title: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detected while open
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am working on adobe form and I am facing system error  as show below.

 


 I have done all the three tests of ADS
FP_TEST_00
FP_CHECK_DESTINATION_SERVICE
FP_PDF_TEST_00

All the three reports are giving the results as expected .

Earlier I did not understand what the system error is about. After going through few threads I could able to trace from where the error is coming and what the error is about.

CREATE_OUTPUT_CURRENT_FORM is the subroutine where I could able to capture the error.

The following is the error :

Processing exception during a "Render" operation. Request start time: Tue Apr 08 14:40:29 IST 2025 com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ProcessingException: IO error detected while opening DEST connection: http://100.64.109.143:8080/sap/bc/fp/form/layout/ZMATERIAL_EXP_QA_CHECK2.XDP?fp-language=EN&fp-mlayout-sup=X&fp-cacheinfo=2025-04-07T05:34:18Z$5ef403a9-256d-4ee3-aaef-7f7832056b50$0$en$v1.0$ Exception Stack Trace: com.adobe.

NOTE : I am getting this error only in quality system . It is working fine in Development system.
Can you please let me know what is the cause of this system error and how to fix it. ?


I could able to find one post where the issue is the same as above and solution was offered to open backend system port connection from portal side. The thread is the below one. It is not clear to how to do it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problem-trying-read-data-from-destination/qaq-p/4290340

entry.title: How to lock object with odata?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How can i lock an object with odata.

as an example : user has a list of deliveries in android app, when it clicked to specific delivery he revieves a list of materials in this delivery.
If a user clicked - i don't want to allow changing this delivery in sap using sap t-code's ( vl*).
I tried using 'ENQUEUE_EVVBLKE', but lock dissapears when the user get the result of responce.
I want to save a lock untill the user comeback to previous screen or save changes.
I've read about etag, but as i understood it's more about lock's before saving to db.

entry.title: Error when accessing data element in smartform
entry.content:
Hello community
I am working with smartforms in 'SAP ECC 6.0' and when I enter a smartform through the smartforms transaction and click on a text element, WORD automatically opens with the data from the data element. If I change something, it does not save.
Does anyone know why this happens?
My WORD version is Microsoft® Word for Microsoft 365 MSO (Version 2503 Build 16.0.18623.20116) 64 bits

entry.title: BRF transports
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to read the BRF changes contained in a transport.

Sometimes transports are old and would like to check the contents before moving to production.

Here is the scenario:

1- I have a released transport TR1 with a BRF decision table DT1 changes.

2- I would like to export to Excel the BRF changes in DT1, contained in the transport,  before moving to production system

I tried workbench analysis, but it does not give the content. It only shows the changed objects.

I checked all FDT transport classes but was not able to get what i want.

Thanks a lot

entry.title: New font for Riyal symbol to be displayed in smartform
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to display newly launched Riyal symbol in the print. I have downloaded .ttf file from 'https://github.com/emran-alhaddad/Saudi-Riyal-Font?tab=readme-ov-file'.

Then I uploaded the file using RSTXSF01 under the font name 'ZRIYAL' and used the font to create a character format in smartstyle. Then I used character format in smart form but the Riyal symbol is not coming. Whereas when I uploaded the same font in Windows and displayed the value 'E900' using  Alt + 'X' the Riyal symbol is displayed.

In smart form, the value is showing as 'E900' only. I am using device type ARSWIN (to display Arabic text).

Please suggest how to achieve the Riyal symbol.

entry.title: Smart Table fields not become editable when I press the edit button different behavior on versions
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a question : In SAP BTP I use 2 versions locally of an SAP Smart Table application - In the 1.127.0 version I use the same code as in the 1.96.38 version : 

<mvc:View controllerName="..."  

    xmlns="sap.f"

    xmlns:m="sap.m"

    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"

    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"

    xmlns:smartFilterBar="sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar"

    xmlns:smartTable="sap.ui.comp.smarttable"

    xmlns:sv="sap.ui.comp.smartvariants"

    xmlns:sf="sap.ui.comp.smartfield"

    xmlns:form="sap.ui.comp.smartform"

    xmlns:app="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1"

    height="100%">

 

     <DynamicPage id="dynamicPage" fitContent="true">

        <header>

            <DynamicPageHeader id="_IDGenDynamicPageHeader1">

                <smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar id="smartFilterBar" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored"  enableBasicSearch="true">

                    <smartFilterBar:layoutData>

                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData1" shrinkFactor="0"/>

                    </smartFilterBar:layoutData>

                </smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar>

            </DynamicPageHeader>

        </header>

        <content>

            <smartTable:SmartTable id="LineItemsSmartTable" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" smartFilterId="smartFilterBar" tableType="ResponsiveTable"  

                enableExport="true" beforeExport="onBeforeExport" useVariantManagement="true" useTablePersonalisation="true" header="{i18n>smartTableHeader}"  

                showRowCount="true" persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored" enableAutoBinding="true"  class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"  

                enableAutoColumnWidth="true" editTogglable="true" showDetailsButton="true" detailsButtonSetting="Medium,Low" demandPopin="true"  

                app:useSmartField = "true" editToggled="onEditToggled" placeToolbarInTable="true">  

                    <smartTable:customToolbar>

                        <m:Toolbar id="_IDGenToolbar" >

                            <m:ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbarSpacer1" ></m:ToolbarSpacer>

                            <m:Button icon="sap-icon://create" enabled = "false" id="_IDGenButton" press="onCreate" text="{i18n>Create}"></m:Button>

                            <m:Button icon="sap-icon://request" enabled = "false" id="_MassChange" press="onMassChange" text="{i18n>MassChange}"></m:Button>

                        </m:Toolbar>

                    </smartTable:customToolbar>

                    <smartTable:layoutData>

                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData2" growFactor="1" baseSize="0%"/>

                    </smartTable:layoutData>  

                    <m:Table id="_IDGenTable" growing="true" growingThreshold="20" growingScrollToLoad="true" mode="MultiSelect"  sticky="ColumnHeaders,HeaderToolbar" />

                </smartTable:SmartTable>

        </content>

    </DynamicPage>  

</mvc:View>

The difference is that on the 1.127.0 version when I press the Edit/toggle button the fields are becoming editable and can add values on them, and in the 1.96.38 version the fields are not becoming editable when I press the button and the ones that have no value are showing just a field with a line. I know that the  app:useSmartField = "true" may be not compatible, but do you know any workaround to solve this issue please ?

entry.title: Eclipse ADT Version 2025-03 (4.35.0) crashes *continuously* in Mac (aarch64)
entry.content:
I've recently updated Eclipse (with the prospect of, you know, testing that ABAP LLM buzz) and since then my life has become a nightmare.

I work with a MacBook M2 Max in Sequoia 15.4 and now I'm finding extremely difficult to have some continuity when coding.

So this is my life now, I see this window on the order of a couple dozen a day:

My question is: why? but, also, is it only me? Just in case, I've warned the rest of my team to keep themselves a hundred miles away from the new version.

Besides the regular installation of Eclipse + ADT package I only have installed the plugins for AbapCleaner and Github's Copilot (in the case of this last one I installed it after upgrading and already suffering this behavior so it doesn't seem to be guilty of this crime).

Dose any other developer, with more or less my same setup, suffer this punishment? Any ideas before I give up and uninstall-reinstall the older working version of Eclipse+ADT I can find?

entry.title: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a topic?
entry.content:
Hi,
 
more than 10 years ago i wrote a couple of blogs on ABAP
performance tracing with ST12 (see below). 

The performance tools in ADT and the tools for SAP GUI
in  the SAP standard (STATS, SAT, ST05 and SCI) are
always available and particularly good in their specific areas.
But for me,  ST12 was (and in 2025 still is) like a
Swiss army knife when it comes to ABAP performance tracing.
I like to use it as a first tool and revert to the other tools when
necessary.

In the last 10+ years i haven't been active on here since
i worked on other topics. Now I'm back and work on ABAP (and
CDS and HANA) topics again. I looked a little bit around here and
still remember some names that i have seen more than 10 years ago.

I wonder if ABAP performance tracing is sill a topic or are
ABAP performance problems = solved problems? Would
you be interested in an update on ST12 or is this an outdated
topic and not relevant to you anymore?

Kind regards,

Hermann
 
 
Single Transaction Analysis (ST12) – getting start... - SAP Community
ST12 - The workprocess trace - SAP Community
ST12 - storing additional information and managing... - SAP Community
ST12 – tracing user requests (Tasks & HTTP) - SAP Community
ST12 - tracing a single dialog step - SAP Community
ST12 - tracing function modules - SAP Community
ST12 – Who calls whom (get the call stack with bot... - SAP Community
ST12 - new features - SAP Community
ST12 - 01N_* SP1 new features - SAP Community
ST12 - Schedule Traces - SAP Community

entry.title: Business Application Studio - Adding test cases learning unit - test.js
entry.content:
Hello,

I am learning ABAP coding.
The current unit is Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP/Adding Test Cases
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/adding-test-cases
When I test the application there are errors. I tried to install components, went back to see if I had missed something.

I found the test.js code might be the issue.
The test.js code can be found in two places.
1 - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/add-test-cases.html
When I copy the first, there are 3 errors.
2 - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2023-XP260/tree/main/exercises/Add%20Test%20Cases
When I copy the second, there are 2 errors.
Errors are attached.

I tried to figure out what might be the issue but I haven't found it yet.
Any idea?

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? (nextval)
entry.content:
I'd like to do a SELECT query in an AMDP method with one column being a number starting at 1, incremented by 1, without gaps.

As ROW_NUMBER is not guaranteed to avoid gaps, I guess I should use a SEQUENCE HANA object that I reset to 1 before running the query. For using a sequence, I need to use HANA SQL, so either I use native SQL, or I use a CDS table function and AMDP.

With native SQL, it works:

REPORT.
DATA dummy_column TYPE c LENGTH 1.
DATA autoincrement TYPE i.
DATA error TYPE REF TO cx_root.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL.
      drop sequence zmysequence;
    ENDEXEC.
  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO error ##NO_HANDLER ##NEEDED.
ENDTRY.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL.
      create sequence zmysequence start with 1 increment by 1;
    ENDEXEC.
  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO error ##NO_HANDLER ##NEEDED.
ENDTRY.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL PERFORMING test.
      select dummy_column, 
             zmysequence.nextval autoincrement
          from ( select 'A' dummy_column from dummy
                 union select 'B' dummy_column from dummy )
          into :dummy_column, :autoincrement
    ENDEXEC.
  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO error ##NO_HANDLER ##NEEDED.
ENDTRY.

ASSERT 1 = 1. " dummy statement for setting a breakpoint (if debug needed)

FORM test.
  WRITE : / dummy_column, autoincrement.
ENDFORM.

If now I try with AMDP, it doesn't allow sequences:

Error without USING:

"ZMYSEQUENCE" is unknown. ABAP objects and DDIC objects must be declared in the USING clause of the method. Local names must start with ":" here.

Error with USING:

"ZMYSEQUENCE" is invalid. Only transparent database tables, views, or AMDP methods can be specified after USING.

Is there a way to define an autoincrement with AMDP?
